title: SupplierBidResponse
description: Supplier-facing response payload received by the Bid Collection Agent from a supplier API for a single requested part.

request_id.description: Unique identifier of the procurement request.

bid_request_id.description: Unique identifier of the bid request sent to the supplier.

supplier_id.description: Unique identifier of the supplier responding to the bid request.

SupplierOffer.description: Offer returned by a supplier. When status is declined or failed, placeholder values are used and the error object explains the outcome.

offer_id.description: Unique identifier of the supplier offer.

supplier_id.description: Unique identifier of the supplier submitting the offer.

part_id.description: Requested part identifier this offer answers.

material_code.description: Internal code of the requested material or item.

price.description: Total offer price for the requested quantity.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the offer price.

delivery_date.description: Supplier committed delivery date, expressed as an ISO 8601 date.

quality_score.description: Supplier or offer quality score on a 0 to 100 scale.

reliability_score.description: Supplier reliability score on a 0 to 100 scale.

valid_until.description: Date until which the supplier offer remains valid, expressed as an ISO 8601 date.

code.description: Supplier response error code. Use an empty string when status is offer_received.

message.description: Supplier response error message. Use an empty string when status is offer_received.
examples: The supplier API did not respond before the deadline.
